subcodes.first_line: The Day of Patience hath indeed come to pass, and the hour of steadfast endurance and remembrance of God, the Sovereign, the Chosen One. In truth, it is the Day of Patience [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی یوم الصبر و حین الاصطبار و الذکر لله الملک المختار فی الحقیقه روز صبر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
